subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God! This Day is God's Day, and the radiant lights of the Speaker of Sinai have illumined the realm of meaning and utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله یوم یوم الله است و انوار ظهور مکلم طور عالم معانی و بیان را منور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital
